## BrainSAIT Mission

To empower Saudi Arabia's healthcare digital transformation through intelligent automation, enabling providers to deliver better care while optimizing financial performance.

---

## Vision 2030 Alignment

BrainSAIT directly supports these Vision 2030 objectives:

| Objective | BrainSAIT Contribution |
|-----------|------------------------|
| Healthcare efficiency | 80% faster claim processing |
| Digital transformation | AI-powered automation |
| Economic diversification | Local tech employment |
| Innovation | Novel AI solutions |

---

## Product Ecosystem

### Core Platform

- **ClaimLinc** - Intelligent claim validation
- **PolicyLinc** - Payer policy interpretation
- **DocsLinc** - Document processing

### Healthcare Solutions

- **RadioLinc** - Diagnostic imaging AI
- **Voice2Care** - Patient interaction
- **HealthSync** - iOS health app

### Infrastructure

- **MasterLinc** - Agent orchestration
- **Efhm** - RAG knowledge system

---

## Target Markets

### Primary

- Saudi hospitals (private sector)
- Insurance companies
- Medical groups

### Secondary

- Gulf region healthcare
- SME healthcare providers

---

## Revenue Model

### SaaS Subscriptions

- Monthly/annual plans
- Tiered by volume
- Enterprise custom pricing

### Implementation Services

- Setup and integration
- Training
- Customization

### Success-Based Fees

- Revenue recovery sharing
- Performance bonuses
